Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Clojure: The Documentary, official trailer [video] 168 upvotes, 14 comments
  2. OpenGridWorks: The Electricity Infrasctructure, Mapped 103 upvotes, 12 comments
  3. Agents of Chaos 102 upvotes, 12 comments
  4. Researchers find 3,500-year-old loom that reveals textile revolution 111 upvotes, 14 comments
  5. Oscar Reutersvärd (2021) 25 upvotes, 1 comments
  6. Unit: A self-replicating Forth mesh agent running in a browser tab 32 upvotes, 2 comments
  7. Cherri – programming language that compiles to an Apple Shortuct 302 upvotes, 59 comments
  8. We're Pausing Asimov Press 14 upvotes, 0 comments
  9. Axios compromised on NPM – Malicious versions drop remote access trojan 669 upvotes, 202 comments
  10. Fedware: Government apps that spy harder than the apps they ban 552 upvotes, 181 comments
  11. How to turn anything into a router 665 upvotes, 230 comments
  12. Do your own writing 511 upvotes, 184 comments
  13. Show HN: I turned a sketch into a 3D-print pegboard for my kid with an AI agent 37 upvotes, 8 comments
  14. Universal Claude.md – cut Claude output tokens 281 upvotes, 105 comments
  15. Ollama is now powered by MLX on Apple Silicon in preview 206 upvotes, 82 comments
  16. Turning a MacBook into a touchscreen with $1 of hardware (2018) 306 upvotes, 138 comments
  17. Sony halts memory card shipments due to NAND shortage 45 upvotes, 14 comments
  18. CodingFont: A game to help you pick a coding font 406 upvotes, 201 comments
  19. Incident March 30th, 2026 – Accidental CDN Caching 52 upvotes, 18 comments
  20. Google's 200M-parameter time-series foundation model with 16k context 93 upvotes, 44 comments
  21. Good CTE, Bad CTE 22 upvotes, 7 comments
  22. GitHub backs down, kills Copilot pull-request ads after backlash 149 upvotes, 84 comments
  23. Bird brains (2023) 317 upvotes, 198 comments
  24. Show HN: Free AI Coding Skills for Rails 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  25. Artemis II is not safe to fly 279 upvotes, 178 comments
  26. Vulnerability research is cooked 173 upvotes, 117 comments
  27. Mr. Chatterbox is a Victorian-era ethically trained model 42 upvotes, 23 comments
  28. Android Developer Verification 241 upvotes, 233 comments
  29. One of the largest salt mines in the world exists under Lake Erie 18 upvotes, 11 comments
  30. RamAIn (YC W26) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments
